title: Year at the end of the dates
excerpt: I noticed for 2022 the dates no longer have the year but anything older does have the year. Is this because we are working in 2022?

posts.author: jodnt (Joanne Donato)
posts.cookedHtml: I noticed for 2022 the dates no longer have the year but anything older does have the year. Is this because we are working in 2022?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! Sorry for the late response! Are you still experiencing this issue with the dates? If so, write to us at support@monday.com and we can look into this together there!
